paths_read: local reference/input images provided for editing or style transfer
rationale: The skill is mostly prose about prompt-writing, but it explicitly instructs the agent to use adjacent find-models and compare-models skills and to query the Replicate API before choosing models. Image editing/style-reference workflows imply reading user-provided local image assets, but the skill does not itself prescribe writing files or deleting files. Network access is centered on Replicate API/model/blog endpoints, with Replicate delivery URLs implied for generated image outputs.
